calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Steven Adair MacDonald, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Hai Peng Chen, who was placed under oath but did not testify.
Janet Kuang, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Gary Joseph Gisler.

Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 28, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Three (3) Day Notice to Quit dated 05/28/10..............................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Hai Peng Chen, and against defendant Gary Joseph Gisler as follows:

Holdover Damages - $483.43.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $483.43.

Additionally, plaintiff Hai Peng Chen is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1862 21st Avenue (lower in-law unit) one bedroom plus use of the commons areas. The rental agreement is canceled.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of JUL-12-2010 remains on calendar.
